title: History UI types for documents, diagrams, and designs
purpose: Defines TypeScript interfaces for history tracking and UI components related to document, diagram, and design versioning.
module_context: Exports multiple interfaces for history data structures, component props, and hook return types for different history-related features.

steps.content: Define the structure for document history data.
Include original document content and array of chronological changes.
Define the type alias for diagram history data.
Use the same structure as DocumentHistory.
Define the type alias for design history data.
Use the same structure as DocumentHistory.
